name: agentic-workflow-kit
description: Generic, tracker-driven, spec-first delivery workflow for any repo: plan products, technical solutions, and tracks, implement stories end-to-end, and optionally orchestrate autonomous multi-session runs.

interface.longDescription: Plan PRDs, add a technical solution gate for complex work, decompose plans into delivery trackers and story briefs, implement one story at a time, and optionally dry-run or launch orchestrated Codex child sessions from the same tracker/config contract.
defaultPrompt: Use agentic-workflow-kit to initialize tracker-driven delivery in this repo.
Use agentic-workflow-kit to create a PRD, technical solution when needed, and delivery tracker for this product work.
Use agentic-workflow-kit to implement the next eligible tracker story.
